name: Mcmillan Shakespeare Limited
analysis: MMS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$19.3800, stop A$18.7308, target A$21.3276 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
